content_review.baked_text_risk: visual review PASS; all five exact prompts explicitly prohibited text, letters, numbers, labels and UI

generation_calls.prompt_exact:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: production tileable game texture for a mobile 2D travel map
Input images: Image 1 is a STYLE AND PALETTE REFERENCE ONLY. Do not copy its composition, map, route, UI, text, objects, cat, die, gate, landmarks, or topology.
Primary request: create one square warm parchment surface, a subtle low-stimulation travel-journal paper texture suitable as a daylight map base.
Scene/backdrop: edge-to-edge flat parchment material only.
Style/medium: soft storybook gouache and printed travel-journal paper, restrained painterly grain, production texture rather than concept art.
Composition/framing: orthographic, uniform detail density, no focal point, visually edge-safe and seamless/tile-friendly.
Lighting/mood: diffuse neutral daylight only, no vignette, no directional cast light, no night lighting, no gold glow.
Color palette: warm sand, oat, muted cream, very subtle desaturated tan fibers.
Materials/textures: fine paper tooth, faint fibers and age variation, extremely subtle mottling; avoid strong cracks or stains.
Constraints: opaque square texture; no border; no map ink; no cartography; no route; no nodes; no numbers; no letters; no labels; no UI; no landmarks; no compass; no character; no animal; no die; no gate; no watermark; no signature.
Avoid: high contrast, dark corners, obvious repeating motif, dramatic lighting, heavy grunge, torn edges, folds.
generation_calls.reference_role: selected atlas target used only for style and palette

generation_calls.prompt_exact:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: production transparent cartography-ink overlay for a mobile 2D travel map
Input images: Image 1 is a STYLE AND PALETTE REFERENCE ONLY. Do not copy its composition, route, UI, text, cat, die, gate, or topology.
Primary request: create one square sparse Cairo cartography ink layer: a gently winding Nile ribbon plus isolated hand-drawn landmark vignettes of Giza pyramids, one Cairo mosque silhouette, a small market canopy cluster, and a few palms.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00FF00 chroma-key background for local background removal. The background must be exactly uniform with no shadows, gradients, paper texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Style/medium: delicate antique travel-journal pen-and-wash cartography, muted blue-gray and desaturated teal ink, restrained storybook linework, production overlay rather than concept art.
Composition/framing: square orthographic overlay, generous open space, sparse balanced landmark clusters, Nile clearly reads as water not a road. Keep all ink at least 48 pixels from every edge.
Lighting/mood: neutral daylight ink only; no glow, no lantern light, no night vignette.
Color palette: muted slate-blue, dusty teal, faint warm-gray linework; do not use #00FF00 in any artwork.
Constraints: no route line; no dotted path; no dashed path; no connected gameplay trail; no nodes; no circles intended as spaces; no arrows; no numbers; no letters; no words; no labels; no EXIT; no UI; no HUD; no character; no animal; no die; no gate; no compass rose; no border; no signature; no watermark. No cast shadow. Crisp separated ink edges with generous padding.
Avoid: dense city scene, photorealism, perspective map, parchment background, decorative typography, glyphs, seals, stamps, repeated icons.

generation_calls.prompt_exact:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: candidate production sprite sheet for raised route tiles in a mobile 2D game
Input images: Image 1 is a STYLE AND PALETTE REFERENCE ONLY. Use only its restrained storybook parchment/teal/brass/rust material language. Do not copy its route, numbers, UI, cat, die, gate, labels, or composition.
Primary request: one square 2-by-2 production sheet containing exactly four isolated raised circular travel-map tile treatments, one centered tile per equal quadrant.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00FF00 chroma-key background for local background removal. Exactly uniform background, no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00FF00 in the tile artwork.
Cell layout and order: top-left MAIN = warm parchment face with restrained teal rim; top-right BYPASS = warm parchment face with a rust-red rim using a clearly broken/dashed rim language; bottom-left LOOP = warm parchment face with concentric antique-brass and muted-teal ring; bottom-right CURRENT = visibly more raised warm parchment tile with a crisp muted-teal outer rim and restrained antique-gold inner accent.
Style/medium: soft storybook gouache game sprite, shallow 2.5D painted bevel, crisp mobile silhouette, production asset rather than concept art.
Composition/framing: four equal square cells, one tile centered in each cell, identical apparent diameter and perspective, identical common bottom-center baseline, at least 18% clear padding around each tile, no overlap, no dividers.
Lighting/mood: diffuse daylight only; very subtle internal bevel shading; no cast shadows; no glow; no lantern or night lighting.
Color palette: warm parchment, muted deep teal, antique brass, restrained dusty rust.
Constraints: exactly four tiles; no text; no letters; no numbers; no icons; no pictograms; no arrows; no route line outside the tiles; no nodes; no character; no animal; no die; no UI; no watermark; no signature. Faces must remain blank.
Avoid: jewel-like saturation, strong bloom, photoreal materials, floor shadows, labels, poster composition, decorative border around the whole sheet.

generation_calls.prompt_exact:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: candidate production two-state boss-gate sprite sheet for a mobile 2D game
Input images: Image 1 is a STYLE AND PALETTE REFERENCE ONLY. Use only its storybook Egyptian travel-journal material language. Do not copy its route, UI, text, cat, die, labels, or composition.
Primary request: one square production sheet with exactly two isolated versions of the same compact Egyptian boss gate, left and right, sharing an identical architectural silhouette and bottom-center anchor.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00FF00 chroma-key background for local background removal. Exactly uniform background, no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, reflections, or lighting variation. Do not use #00FF00 anywhere in the gate artwork.
State layout: LEFT = sleeping/unlit state, closed arched doorway, muted sandstone, antique brass, restrained teal inlay, dark interior, no emitted light. RIGHT = awakened state of the identical gate and silhouette, same closed architecture and proportions, warm antique-gold illumination contained inside its doorway and carved inlays, restrained and readable, no broad scene lighting.
Subject: compact symmetrical Egyptian arched gate with two short sandstone pylons and a simple feline/sphinx relief crown; no creature, no statue figures, no letters, no hieroglyph-like glyphs.
Style/medium: soft storybook gouache game sprite, crisp mobile silhouette, shallow painted depth, production asset rather than concept art.
Composition/framing: two equal vertical half-canvas cells, one gate centered per cell, same scale, same perspective, same bottom baseline, at least 12% padding, no overlap, no dividers.
Lighting/mood: left diffuse daylight and unlit; right internal warm-gold awakening only. No external cast shadow, no ground plane, no lanterns, no night vignette.
Color palette: warm sandstone, muted deep teal, antique brass; awakened accents in restrained amber-gold.
Constraints: exactly two gate states; no text; no letters; no numbers; no labels; no route; no nodes; no UI; no character; no animal; no die; no watermark; no signature; no poster framing.
Avoid: different silhouettes between states, open portal scenery, fire, lightning, neon, strong bloom, photorealism, floor shadow, decorative sheet border.

generation_calls.prompt_exact:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: candidate production four-frame lantern-gold effect sprite sheet for boss-only mobile game states
Input images: Image 1 is a STYLE AND PALETTE REFERENCE ONLY. Use only its restrained antique-gold storybook accent language. Do not copy its gate, route, UI, text, cat, die, labels, or composition.
Primary request: one square 2-by-2 production sheet with exactly four isolated variants of the same tall warm lantern-light aura, designed as a subtle breathing sequence for boss arrival, TRIPLE feedback, and enhanced-lap emphasis.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00FF00 chroma-key background for local background removal. Exactly uniform background with no paper texture, floor plane, reflections, scene lighting, or background gradient. Do not use #00FF00 in the effect artwork.
Frame sequence: top-left = smallest quiet amber flame-and-halo motif; top-right = slightly fuller warm-gold motif; bottom-left = brightest restrained antique-gold motif with a simple symmetric three-lobe crown suggesting a TRIPLE beat but no symbols; bottom-right = settling warm-gold motif with subtle brass sparks. All four remain the same effect family.
Style/medium: soft storybook gouache light sprite, layered amber/gold brush shapes with a crisp readable core and controlled feathered halo, production effect rather than concept art.
Composition/framing: four equal square cells, one vertical effect centered in each cell, shared bottom-center anchor and common baseline, same width family, at least 20% clear padding, no overlap, no dividers.
Lighting/mood: warm lantern light only, restrained bloom, dark-scene readable but not neon.
Color palette: amber, honey gold, antique brass, tiny cream-hot core; no teal or green.
Constraints: exactly four variants; no lantern object; no gate; no text; no letters; no numbers; no icons; no UI; no route; no nodes; no character; no animal; no die; no floor shadow; no watermark; no signature.
Avoid: smoke, glass, realistic fire, large explosive starburst, lightning, lens flare, scene background, strong white bloom, poster layout.
